title: Beyond BI: How the Dataset Q&A feature of Amazon Quick powers the next generation of data decisions
summary: Business leaders across industries rely on operational dashboards as the shared source of truth that their teams execute against daily. But dashboards are built to answer known questions. When teams need to explore further, ad-hoc, multi-dimensional, or unforeseen questions, they hit a bottleneck. They wait hours or days for BI teams to build new views […]

title: Introducing the agent quality loop: AgentCore Optimization now in preview
summary: Generate recommendations from production traces, validate them with batch evaluation and A/B testing, and ship with confidence. AI agents that perform well at launch don’t stay that way. As models evolve, user behavior shifts, and prompts get reused in new contexts they were never designed for. Agent quality quietly degrades. In most teams, the improvement […]

title: Agent-guided workflows to accelerate model customization in Amazon SageMaker AI
summary: Amazon SageMaker AI now offers an agentic experience that changes this. Developers describe their use case using natural language, and the AI coding agent streamlines the entire journey, from use case definition and data preparation through technique selection, evaluation, and deployment. In this post, we walk you through the model customization lifecycle using SageMaker AI agent skills.

title: Generate dashboards from natural language prompts in Amazon Quick
summary: Building meaningful dashboards demands hours of manual setup, even for experienced BI professionals. Amazon Quick now generates complete multi-sheet dashboards from natural language prompts, taking you from one or more datasets to a production-ready analysis in minutes. Data analysts building recurring operations reports, program managers preparing a leadership review, or engineers exploring a new dataset can […]

title: From data lake to AI-ready analytics: Introducing new data source with S3 Tables in Amazon Quick
summary: Amazon Quick introduces Amazon S3 Tables (Apache Iceberg tables) as a new data source. With this feature, customers can directly query and visualize Apache Iceberg tables stored in an Amazon S3 table bucket without the need for intermediate data layers. In this post, we explored how Amazon Quick’s new Amazon S3 Tables data source enables near real-time analytics while streamlining modern data architectures.

title: Introducing Dataset Q&A: Expanding natural language querying for structured datasets in Amazon Quick
summary: In this post, you learn how to get started with Dataset Q&A, explore real-world use cases with hands-on examples, and discover advanced capabilities like auto-discovery across all your data assets and multi-dataset querying in a single conversation.

title: Capacity-aware inference: Automatic instance fallback for SageMaker AI endpoints
summary: Today, Amazon SageMaker AI introduces capacity aware instance pool for new and existing inference endpoints. You define a prioritized list of instance types, and SageMaker AI automatically works through your list whenever capacity is constrained at creation, during scale-out, and during scale-in. Your endpoint provisions on available AI Infrastructure without manual intervention. This capability is available for Single Model Endpoints, Inference Component-based endpoints, and Asynchronous Inference endpoints.

title: Introducing Brand Studio: The creative production platform powered by your brand
summary: We’re excited to introduce Brand Studio by Stability AI, the end-to-end creative production platform powered by your brand.

title: Stability AI Joins the Tech Coalition
summary: We’re pleased to share that Stability AI has joined the Tech Coalition, a global alliance of leading technology companies working together to combat online child sexual exploitation and abuse.

title: Warner Music Group and Stability AI Join Forces To Build The Next Generation Of Responsible AI Tools For Music Creation
summary: Warner Music Group and Stability AI today announced a collaborative effort to advance the use of responsible AI in music creation, combining WMG’s long-standing advocacy for principled innovation with Stability AI’s expertise and leadership in commercially-safe generative audio.

title: Universal Music Group and Stability AI Announce Strategic Alliance to Co-Develop Professional AI Music Creation Tools
summary: Universal Music Group and Stability AI today announced a strategic alliance to develop next-generation professional music creation tools, powered by responsibly trained generative AI and built to support the creative process of artists, producers and songwriters globally.

title: Stability AI and EA Partner to Empower Artists, Designers, and Developers to Reimagine Game Development
summary: Stability AI and Electronic Arts (EA) have formed a strategic partnership to co-develop transformative generative AI models, tools, and workflows that empower EA’s artists, designers, and developers to reimagine how games are made.

title: Stability AI Brings Image Services to Amazon Bedrock, Delivering End-to-End Creative Control with Enterprise-Grade Infrastructure
summary: Today, we're excited to announce we’re expanding our partnership with Amazon Web Services to bring our Stable Image Services to Amazon Bedrock.

title: Stability AI’s Annual Integrity Transparency Report
summary: At Stability AI, we are committed to building and deploying generative AI responsibly, and we believe that transparency is foundational to safe and ethical AI.

title: Stability AI Introduces Stable Audio 2.5, the First Audio Model Built for Enterprise Sound Production at Scale
summary: We’re excited to release Stable Audio 2.5, our latest audio model and the first developed for enterprise-grade use cases. Stable Audio 2.5 introduces advancements in quality and control that address the demand for dynamic compositions that can be adapted for custom brand needs.

title: Foundational research powering efficient inference at scale
summary: As AI moves from research to production, the challenge for AI-native teams shifts from building models to running them — efficiently, reliably, and at scale.

title: DeepSeek-R1 Release
Thinking Mode
introducing DeepSeek-V3
Context Caching is Available 2024/08/02
summary: The DeepSeek API now supports V4-Pro and V4-Flash, available via both the OpenAI ChatCompletions interface and the Anthropic interface. To access the new models, the base_url remains unchanged, and the model parameter should be set to deepseek-v4-pro or deepseek-v4-flash .

title: New API Features 2024/07/25
summary: The DeepSeek API now supports V4-Pro and V4-Flash, available via both the OpenAI ChatCompletions interface and the Anthropic interface. To access the new models, the base_url remains unchanged, and the model parameter should be set to deepseek-v4-pro or deepseek-v4-flash .

title: AutoClaw launched
summary: Zhipu AI highlights AutoClaw as a new product that can be installed on any computer in about one minute. It is presented as part of the company's agent-oriented product lineup.

title: GLM-5-Turbo announced
summary: Zhipu AI introduced GLM-5-Turbo as a foundation model optimized for agent scenarios, with deep training-level improvements to tool use and long-horizon execution. It is positioned as part of the company's next-generation full-stack large model system.

title: GLM-5 released as a flagship agent foundation model
summary: Zhipu AI presents GLM-5 as a new flagship base model for agent engineering, claiming open-source SOTA performance in coding and agent capabilities. The page also states that GLM-5 performs strongly on SWE-bench Verified and Terminal Bench 2.0, comparable to Claude Opus 4.5.

title: GLM-4.6V open-source vision reasoning model announced
summary: Zhipu AI announced GLM-4.6V as an open-source visual reasoning model with standout performance at the 100B scale. It is described as achieving same-scale SOTA visual understanding accuracy, supporting native tool calling, automatic task completion, and 128K context.

title: AutoGLM agent model introduced
summary: Zhipu AI introduced AutoGLM as an agent model with autonomous planning, reasoning, and execution capabilities. The company says it addresses task planning, data scarcity, and strategy optimization while enabling continual self-improvement.

title: CogAgent-9B open sourced as the base model for GLM-PC
summary: Zhipu AI announced that it is open-sourcing CogAgent-9B, the base model behind GLM-PC, to support the broader large-model agent ecosystem. The company says the model was trained from GLM-4V-9B for specialized agent tasks and can operate from screenshots alone without HTML or other text inputs.

title: GLM-OS concept unveiled with AutoGLM and GLM-PC
summary: On November 29, Zhipu AI formally proposed the GLM-OS concept and launched two agent products: AutoGLM and GLM-PC. This announcement frames the company's push toward a broader agent operating ecosystem.

title: AutoGLM gains cross-app and long-horizon autonomous operation
summary: At Zhipu Agent OpenDay, the company announced new progress for its agent products, saying AutoGLM can autonomously execute more than 50 steps and work across apps. It also introduced a more fully automated web-browsing experience and expanded agent use cases.

Seed3D 2.0 Released: Higher Precision and Greater Usability
summary: ByteDance Seed announced Seed3D 2.0, highlighting improved precision and usability over the previous version. The release is presented as a new model update in the company's blog.

title: Introducing Seed Full-Duplex Speech LLM
summary: ByteDance Seed introduced Seed Full-Duplex Speech LLM, emphasizing attentive listening, robust interference suppression, and more natural interaction. The announcement positions it as a new speech model release.

title: ByteDance Seed 2027 Foundation Model Campus Recruitment is Now Open (Internships Included)
summary: ByteDance Seed announced the opening of its 2027 Foundation Model campus recruitment program, including internship opportunities. This is a company hiring and talent program announcement.

title: Dola-Seed-2.0-Preview Model Release on Arena
summary: ByteDance Seed released the Dola-Seed-2.0-Preview model on Arena. The post indicates a preview-stage model launch for public evaluation or comparison.

title: Seed 2.0 Official Launch
summary: ByteDance Seed officially launched Seed 2.0. The announcement marks a major model release in the Seed lineup.

title: Introducing Seedream 5.0 Lite
summary: ByteDance Seed introduced Seedream 5.0 Lite, describing it as offering deeper thinking and more accurate generation. The post presents it as a new model release.

title: Seedance 2.0 Official Launch
summary: ByteDance Seed officially launched Seedance 2.0. The announcement identifies it as a new model release in the company's portfolio.

title: Seed Prover 1.5
summary: ByteDance Seed announced Seed Prover 1.5, focused on advanced mathematical reasoning through a novel agentic architecture. The post presents it as a specialized model update.

title: WorldWise Enterprise LLM Platform 2.5 announced
summary: 01.AI announced WorldWise Enterprise LLM Platform 2.5, positioning 2026 as a critical year for enterprise deployment of multi-agent systems. The update highlights the company's focus on enterprise AI infrastructure and agent-based workflows.

title: 01.AI launches “Super Employee” enterprise AI agent
summary: 01.AI launched “Super Employee,” an enterprise AI agent aimed at delivering measurable business value. The announcement frames the product as marking a new phase for enterprise AI agents focused on practical deployment outcomes.

title: 01.AI's LLM One-box Solution Machine receives CAICT top-level certification
summary: 01.AI announced that its LLM One-box Solution Machine received top-level certification from CAICT. The certification signals external validation for the company's enterprise large-model deployment hardware or integrated solution.

title: Yi-Lightning introduced as a global SOTA Mixture-of-Experts LLM
summary: 01.AI highlighted Yi-Lightning as a globally state-of-the-art Mixture-of-Experts large language model. The page also indicates it is part of the Yi open-source model lineup.

title: Kazakhstan President Tokayev meets with 01.AI CEO Kai-Fu Lee
summary: 01.AI reported that Kazakhstan President Kassym-Jomart Tokayev met with CEO Kai-Fu Lee. This is a notable company news item indicating high-level international engagement.
